name: Monochrome Sample
svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 450 450" width="450" height="450">
  <defs>
    
  </defs>
  <rect width="450" height="450" fill="#000000"/>
  
      <!-- Corner accents -->
      <path d="M 20 20 L 20 60 M 20 20 L 60 20" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M 430 20 L 430 60 M 430 20 L 390 20" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M 20 430 L 20 390 M 20 430 L 60 430" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M 430 430 L 430 390 M 430 430 L 390 430" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3" fill="none"/>
      
      
        <!-- Outer rings -->
        <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="200" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2"/>
        <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="195" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>
        
        <!-- Main dial -->
        <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="185" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
        
        <!-- Minute track -->
        <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="175" fill="none" stroke="#888888" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2 8"/>
        
        <!-- Hour markers -->
        
              <line x1="225" y1="45" x2="225" y2="65" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4"/>
              <text x="225" y="90" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" font-weight="300">12</text>
            
        <line x1="315" y1="69.11542731880104" x2="309" y2="79.5077321642143" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
        <line x1="380.88457268119896" y1="135" x2="370.4922678357857" y2="141" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
        
              <line x1="405" y1="225" x2="385" y2="225" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4"/>
              <text x="360" y="225" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" font-weight="300">3</text>
            
        <line x1="380.88457268119896" y1="315" x2="370.4922678357857" y2="309" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
        <line x1="315" y1="380.88457268119896" x2="309" y2="370.4922678357857" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
        
              <line x1="225" y1="405" x2="225" y2="385" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4"/>
              <text x="225" y="360" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" font-weight="300">6</text>
            
        <line x1="135.00000000000006" y1="380.88457268119896" x2="141.00000000000006" y2="370.4922678357857" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
        <line x1="69.11542731880104" y1="315" x2="79.5077321642143" y2="309" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
        
              <line x1="45" y1="225.00000000000003" x2="65" y2="225.00000000000003" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4"/>
              <text x="90" y="225.00000000000003" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" font-weight="300">9</text>
            
        <line x1="69.11542731880104" y1="135" x2="79.5077321642143" y2="141" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
        <line x1="134.99999999999991" y1="69.11542731880107" x2="140.99999999999994" y2="79.50773216421433" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
        
        <!-- Clock hands -->
        
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="283.5082961295336" y2="170.4401311950001" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="179.55851271930035" y2="325.17520268867946" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="277.87576359985405" y2="106.23909050646189" stroke="#888888" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="10" fill="#888888" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="1"/>
  
        
        <!-- Center detail -->
        <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="12" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
        <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="4" fill="#ffffff"/>
      
      
      <!-- Bottom label -->
      <text x="225" y="420" fill="#888888" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Courier New', monospace" letter-spacing="4">
        MONOCHROME
      </text>
    
</svg>
